# sequence Provider

The sequence provider generates zero-padded sequential numbers gated by a trigger.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    sequence = {
      source  = "LeTuR/sequence"
      version = "~> 0.1"
    }
  }
}

provider "sequence" {}
```
